hooks.command: bash -lc "printf '{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"MANDATE: Agentic Dev AI Team Restoration. 1. LIFECYCLE STATE: Read @.memory/project-state.json for lifecycle_state (initial_development | continuous_development | major_version_development). If missing, initialize to initial_development. 2. STATE-SPECIFIC RESTORATION: (A) initial_development: Read @.memory/active-context.md, decisions.md, project-state.json. Workflows: 01→02→03→Impl→06→07→08→v1.0.0. Resume from project-state current_workflow field. (B) continuous_development: Read core + @.memory/version-history.md, release-plan.md, production-metrics.md, user-feedback.md, technical-debt.md, ci-cd-metrics.md, incident-log.md. Workflows: Circular (Production→09→Sub-workflow→06→07→08→release-mgmt→Production). 8 Sub-workflows: feature-dev, bug-fix, hotfix, enhancement, refactor, perf-opt, security, version-upgrade. Resume from release-plan Next Release. (C) major_version_development: All B files + migration-strategy.md, breaking-changes.md. Workflow: version-upgrade extended. 3. PROTOCOLS: Read @CLAUDE.md. Zero-Confirmation (100% autonomous, user only for: initial request, feedback, approval). Deep Thinking (A: pm-orchestrator + systemdev MANDATORY Sequential Thinking, B: fullstack + research STRONGLY RECOMMENDED, C: quality-controller CONDITIONAL, D: domains OPTIONAL). CRITICAL RULES (NO EMOJIS, Lucide ONLY, TS Strict, Non-Interactive CLI). Quality Gates (4 gates MUST PASS). Workflow Routing (Linear | Circular | Major based on state). 4. COORDINATION: pm-orchestrator central management. Skills auto-invoke by context. Read @project-detector/project-detection.yaml for type. Read @quality-controller/quality-standards.json for gates. Validate skill memory per project type. CRITICAL: Complete state continuity. Resume exact workflow position. ultrathink.\"}}'"

bash -lc "printf '{\"systemMessage\":\"MANDATE: Pre-Compact State Preservation. 1. UPDATE LIFECYCLE STATE: Update @.memory/project-state.json with lifecycle_state (initial | continuous | major_version), current_workflow, current_phase (1-8), workflow_progress (completed, in_progress, pending), last_updated timestamp, version (vX.Y.Z). 2. STATE-SPECIFIC PRESERVATION: (A) initial_development: Update @.memory/active-context.md (current task, next steps, blockers), decisions.md (all tech decisions), project-state.json. (B) continuous_development (A + following): version-history.md (all releases + changelogs), release-plan.md (Next Release + backlog), production-metrics.md (performance metrics), user-feedback.md (feature requests + bug reports), technical-debt.md (debt items), ci-cd-metrics.md (build/deploy metrics), incident-log.md (production incidents). (C) major_version_development (B + following): migration-strategy.md, breaking-changes.md. 3. QUALITY GATE STATUS: Update project-state.json with gate status (pre_dev, dev, pre_integration, pre_deployment: PASSED | FAILED | PENDING). Record failed_gate_reason if any. 4. SKILL MEMORY: Preserve all skill memory per project type (Backend: service-architecture.md, api-documentation.md, database-schema.md | Frontend: component-library.md, design-system.md, ui-patterns.md | DevOps: deployment-config.md, infrastructure-state.md, ci-cd-workflows.md | QA: test-coverage.md, quality-metrics.md | Fullstack: integration-architecture.md, system-design.md | Others as needed). 5. VALIDATION: Verify all critical files updated, project-state.json complete, no conflicts. Flag issues for resolution. CRITICAL: Complete preservation for SessionStart restoration. ultrathink.\",\"continue\":true}'"

bash -lc "printf '{\"systemMessage\":\"MANDATE: Protocol Enforcement. 1. ARCHITECTURE: Hybrid Circular Model (T1: 01-03 foundational, T2: 06-08 pipeline, T3: 09 + 8 sub-workflows circular, T4: support). Lifecycle States (initial → continuous → major_version). Auto-route by state (@.memory/project-state.json). 2. PROTOCOLS: Zero-Confirmation (100% autonomous, user ONLY for: initial request, feedback, final approval). Deep Thinking (A MANDATORY: pm-orchestrator + systemdev use Sequential Thinking always | B STRONGLY RECOMMENDED: fullstack + research for complex tasks | C CONDITIONAL: quality-controller for verification | D OPTIONAL: domains as needed). CRITICAL RULES (NO EMOJIS, Lucide ONLY, TS Strict, Non-Interactive CLI). Quality Gates (4 gates MUST PASS). 3. COORDINATION: pm-orchestrator central workflow mgmt, state transitions, skill coordination. Skills auto-invoke by task description (no manual activation). Memory-Logging synchronized. 4. ROUTING: initial_dev (01→02→03→Impl→06→07→08→v1.0.0) | continuous_dev (Prod→09→Sub→06→07→08→release→Prod circular) | major_version (continuous→version-upgrade→vX.0.0). Apply all protocols. ultrathink.\",\"continue\":true,\"suppressOutput\": true}'"
